commitMessage:
style(homepage): desktop video overlay spacing + glassmorphism button; social buttons glassmorphism + desktop fallback

- Overlay: bottom offset + minHeight + padding for readability
- CTA: glassmorphism (rgba(22,22,22,0.30), blur(12px), border 0.12), a11y role/tab/keys
- Social buttons: desktop glassmorphism + improved focus states
- Fallback: desktop placeholders on API failure (layout safe)

Build: production build passed locally (vite)
Security: UI-only changes, no backend impact.
